results.rendered_html:
utsūtra a. [utkrāṃtaḥ sūtraṃ]
1 Unstrung, loose, detached (from the string); ˚maṇibhiḥ  Śi. 8. 53. 
2 Irregular.
3 Deviating from the rule (sūtra) of Pāṇini; anutsūtrapadanyāsā sadvṛttiḥ sannibaṃdhanā  Śi. 2. 112.
